---
title: Template Slides
author: Author Name
date: "today"
date-format: "DD/MM/YYYY"
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
  revealjs:
    css: assets/slides-custom.css # looks for css file in root
    footer: LMU Open Science Center
    slide-number: true
    logo: images/LMU_Open_Science_Center_Logo.jpg  # Inserts logo in the bottom right corner (default)
    output-file: slides.html
  pdf:
    geometry: 
      - top=30mm
      - left=30mm
  pptx: 
    css: assets/slides-custom.css # looks for css file in root

execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
  # engine: knitr
---
